overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character riding the NCART elevated rail system through a dystopian Night City. The journey traverses neon-lit skyscrapers, passes through a yellow-lit tunnel, and overlooks a bustling plaza with giant holographic advertisements in a rain-soaked, hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated NCART rail track between corporate skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: character moving steadily along the elevated rail track between skyscrapers, approaching and passing the illuminated softsys building on the left

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large red neon grid signage spelling 'softsys'
metal rail track suspended between buildings forming the NCART transit line
dark glass and concrete building wall with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, hazy night in a cyberpunk city, following a character riding an elevated rail track between towering skyscrapers. The prominent softsys building with its red neon grid dominates the left side as the camera moves steadily forward through the narrow corridor of buildings toward a distant tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed transit tunnel with vertical yellow neon lighting

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel with vertical yellow neon light strips lining the walls

agents.ego_description: passing through the enclosed corridor illuminated by rhythmic vertical yellow neon strips

entered.detail: enclosed concrete corridor with repeating rectangular frames
vertical yellow neon strips running along the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a enclosed transit tunnel, transitioning from the open air to a sheltered corridor illuminated by vertical yellow neon lights. The environment becomes artificially lit and confined as the track continues straight through the tunnel structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rail overlooking busy urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting tunnel into open plaza view with large holographic advertisements visible below
giant holographic blue fish and red whale advertisements become prominent in the plaza below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated track, overlooking the busy intersection and massive holographic displays below

entered.detail: tall corporate building with illuminated 'Kang Tao' signage near the top
large open plaza featuring giant floating holographic fish and whale projections
multi-level street intersection with moving vehicle traffic visible below

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast urban plaza overlooked by the elevated track. The Kang Tao building rises on the right while massive holographic fish and whale advertisements float above the busy intersection below. The camera continues along the rail, revealing more of the sprawling neon-lit cityscape and the traffic moving through the streets beneath.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, hazy urban corridor that transitions from towering skyscrapers into a confined tunnel before opening onto a vast, holographic plaza. It begins by gliding along an elevated rail track between skyscrapers, with the red neon grid of the Softsys building dominating the left as the camera moves toward a distant tunnel entrance. As the character enters the transit tunnel, the open night air gives way to a sheltered, artificial environment illuminated by vertical yellow neon lights. The scene then expands as the camera exits the tunnel, revealing a sprawling cityscape where the Kang Tao building rises on the right and massive holographic fish and whales float above a busy intersection. The movement continues along the rail, finally overlooking the dense traffic and neon lights of the bustling plaza below.
